summary: LiveView team data (logos, rosters, player stats) verified working. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend correctly displays team initials when no logo is set, shows team colors, and renders full box score with player statistics.

test_credentials.note: No credentials needed - testing public LiveView page

seed_data_creation: Used existing game: Lakers vs Celtics (share_code: ed00a90f)
context_for_next_testing_agent: LiveView team data is fully working. The /api/games/share/{share_code} endpoint returns home_team_logo, away_team_logo, home_team_roster, away_team_roster, home_player_stats, and away_player_stats fields. Frontend correctly handles null logos by showing team initial in styled circle.

share_endpoint_returns_home_team_logo.description: GET /api/games/share/{share_code} returns home_team_logo field (null if not set)

share_endpoint_returns_away_team_logo.description: GET /api/games/share/{share_code} returns away_team_logo field (null if not set)

share_endpoint_returns_home_team_roster.description: GET /api/games/share/{share_code} returns home_team_roster array with player objects [{number, name}]

share_endpoint_returns_away_team_roster.description: GET /api/games/share/{share_code} returns away_team_roster array with player objects [{number, name}]

share_endpoint_returns_home_player_stats.description: GET /api/games/share/{share_code} returns home_player_stats array with full basketball stats

share_endpoint_returns_away_player_stats.description: GET /api/games/share/{share_code} returns away_player_stats array with full basketball stats

liveview_displays_team_logo_or_initial.description: LiveView shows team logo if available, or team initial in styled circle if not

liveview_displays_player_stats_boxscore.description: LiveView displays full box score with PTS, FG, FG%, 3PT, 3P%, FT, FT%, OREB, DREB, REB, AST, STL, BLK, TO, PF

liveview_scoreboard_team_names_colors.description: LiveView scoreboard shows correct team names (Lakers vs Celtics) and team colors (purple/teal)

test_flow: - Verified home_team_logo field present (null - no logo set)
- Verified away_team_logo field present (null - no logo set)
- Verified home_team_roster array: [{number: '23', name: 'LeBron James'}, {number: '3', name: 'Anthony Davis'}]
- Verified away_team_roster array: [{number: '0', name: 'Jayson Tatum'}, {number: '7', name: 'Jaylen Brown'}]
- Verified team names: Lakers vs Celtics
- Verified team logo containers show initials ('L' for Lakers, 'C' for Celtics)
- Verified team colors displayed correctly (purple for Lakers, teal for Celtics)
- Verified box score tables with player stats
- Verified Lakers players: #3 Anthony Davis (2 PTS), #23 LeBron James (22 PTS), #24 Kobe Bryant (0 PTS)
- Verified Celtics players: #0 Jayson Tatum (0 PTS), #7 Jaylen Brown (0 PTS)
- Verified team totals row in box score

code_verification.server.py_lines_1651-1679: get_game_by_share_code fetches team data from teams collection and adds home_team_logo, away_team_logo, home_team_roster, away_team_roster to response
code_verification.LiveView.jsx_lines_460-465: Home team logo display: shows img if game.home_team_logo exists, otherwise shows team initial
code_verification.LiveView.jsx_lines_546-551: Away team logo display: shows img if game.away_team_logo exists, otherwise shows team initial
